data.content: [2026-04-15] Scope update: step-driving routes (ca9a) abandoned per 97b8 design decision — agents poll GET /api/plans/:id for derived progress + skill prompt and orchestrate individual knots directly. No mutable step state or start/complete/fail routes needed. Verification criteria updated: the POST/GET/list/next/start/complete/fail reference in the original body is superseded — only POST/GET/list flows apply. Remaining work: a9a2 (execution_plan type in Knots) and a431 (payload persistence in Knots), both in implementation. Foolery-side children (2fb5, 56e7) are shipped.
